description_long: This is a modern parking meter with a tall, cylindrical metal post supporting a compact, rectangular meter head. The meter head features a yellow top section, a gray central body, and a display area with various stickers and labels. The front side includes a payment interface with a card slot, buttons, and a small digital display, while the rear side has a blue 'P' parking symbol. A red and yellow information placard is attached to the post below the meter head. The base is a round, sturdy metal flange designed for secure installation on sidewalks or curbs. The overall design is robust, weather-resistant, and intended for outdoor urban environments.
description: A tall, metal parking meter with a yellow-topped head, digital display, card slot, and a red information placard on its post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the payment interface, digital display, and information placard clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the yellow top of the meter head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue 'P' parking symbol and the back of the meter head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the meter's profile and the mounting post.
attribute_payment_interface: Front face features a card slot, several buttons, and a small digital display for payment; likely supports card and possibly contactless payments.
attribute_coin_slot: A coin slot is visible on the front, above the card slot, rectangular with a metallic rim.
attribute_digital_display: A small rectangular digital display is present on the upper front, showing information and interface elements.
attribute_identification_number: A white label with black text is visible on the lower front, likely an identification number, printed on a sticker.
attribute_mounting_post: A cylindrical steel post supports the meter, attached to the base with a round flange and bolted to the ground.
